custom_css: Header .title-3d{font-weight:900!important;font-style:italic!important;text-transform:uppercase!important;color:#fff!important;text-shadow:2px 2px 0 #00d4ff,4px 4px 0 #ffcc33!important;display:flex!important;align-items:center!important;gap:10px!important;animation:wave-float 3s infinite ease-in-out!important}header .title-3d::before{content:none!important}header button{background:#fff!important;border:2px solid #00d4ff!important;border-radius:12px!important;color:#00d4ff!important;font-weight:bold!important}aside .btn-pulse,#main-fire-btn{background:linear-gradient(45deg,#00d4ff,#00ffcc,#ffcc33)!important;color:#fff!important;font-weight:900!important;font-style:italic!important;border-radius:20px!important;text-shadow:0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.2)!important;box-shadow:0 6px 15px rgba(0,212,255,0.4)!important;animation:summer-glow 3s infinite alternate!important;background-size:200% auto!important}#main-fire-btn:active,aside .btn-pulse:active{transform:scale(0.92) rotate(-2deg)!important;filter:saturate(1.5)!important}@keyframes wave-float{0%,100%{transform:translateY(0) rotate(0deg)}50%{transform:translateY(-8px) rotate(2deg)}}@keyframes summer-glow{0%{background-position:0% 50%;box-shadow:0 0 10px #00d4ff}100%{background-position:100% 50%;box-shadow:0 0 25px #ffcc33}}#streak-input{background:#f0faff!important;border:2px solid #00d4ff!important;color:#006699!important;border-radius:10px!important}.tab-btn.active{color:#00d4ff!important;text-shadow:0 0 5px rgba(0,212,255,0.3)!important}.tab-btn.active::after{background:linear-gradient(90deg,#00d4ff,#00ffcc)!important;height:4px!important;border-radius:2px!important}.item-card.selected-card{border-color:#ffcc33!important;box-shadow:0 0 15px rgba(255,204,51,0.5)!important;background:#fff!important}
